rationale: The cited paper appears only once, in the general "Implications for Researchers" discussion, to support a side point that overweight and normal-weight consumers may have similar portion-size estimation. It is not used to build the core hypotheses, model, experimental design, measures, or main empirical interpretation of the 2006 paper. The main argument about low-fat labels, serving-size inferences, and guilt is developed and tested without relying on this specific citation.
